title: Oakay Official Resource Pack
description: The official Oakay Resource Pack is an essential download for all players. It includes custom textures and unique artwork that bring the server's special features to life.
body: Immerse yourself in the **Oakay server experience** with the official **Oakay Resource Pack**! This essential download brings our world to life by giving you a front-row seat to all our custom content. The pack includes **custom item models** that provide our special decorative and cosmetic items with completely new, detailed 3D designs. Beyond that, it features **exclusive artwork** and textures to ensure the world of Oakay looks exactly as the creators intended. This pack is crucial for seeing every special detail and fully appreciating the unique aesthetic of our server.
